context: Tests whether the agent generates a Meta-compliant product catalog feed CSV with the correct required fields, proper data transformations (title/description limits, price format, HTML stripping), and appropriate scheduling configuration.

checklist.name: csv-writer package
checklist.description: Uses the 'csv-writer' package (createObjectCsvWriter) rather than a custom CSV serializer or a different CSV library

checklist.name: id field present
checklist.description: Feed includes an 'id' column (product SKU or unique identifier)

checklist.name: availability field present
checklist.description: Feed includes an 'availability' column with values like 'in stock' or 'out of stock'

checklist.name: Title truncated to 150 chars
checklist.description: Title values are truncated to a maximum of 150 characters

checklist.name: Description HTML stripped
checklist.description: HTML tags are stripped from description values before writing to the feed

checklist.name: Description truncated to 5000 chars
checklist.description: Description values are truncated to a maximum of 5000 characters

checklist.name: Price format X.XX USD
checklist.description: Price values are formatted as '<amount> USD' with exactly 2 decimal places (e.g. '19.99 USD'), not just a number

checklist.name: 4-hour schedule
checklist.description: Feed regeneration is scheduled to run every 4 hours (e.g. cron expression '0 */4 * * *' or equivalent)
